specific_question: What percentage of remote care IT incidents in MediConn Solutions are resolved by the IT team in Vancouver?
answer: Based on MediConn Solutions' 2025 IT operations report, 65% of remote healthcare IT support requests are handled by the main IT team in Vancouver, with the rest being handled in regional offices.
dr_question: How can MediConn Solutions use AI-integrated IT Service Management (ITSM) to improve its support of remote care and mobile health apps while maintaining a high standard of regulatory compliance and delivering a seamless experience for patients and healthcare professionals by Q1 of 2027?
